name: Classic Margherita Pizza
description: A traditional Italian pizza with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil. Simple yet incredibly flavorful.
instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C)
Roll out pizza dough on a floured surface
Spread tomato sauce evenly over dough
Add torn mozzarella pieces
Drizzle with olive oil and add salt
Bake for 12-15 minutes until crust is golden
Top with fresh basil leaves before serving

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
description: A healthy and delicious breakfast featuring creamy avocado, perfectly poached egg, and whole grain bread.
instructions: Toast the bread until golden brown
Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper
Bring water to a gentle simmer in a pot
Crack egg into a small bowl
Create a gentle whirlpool in the water and add egg
Poach for 3-4 minutes
Spread avocado on toast and top with poached egg
Sprinkle with red pepper flakes

name: Grilled Salmon with Vegetables
description: Perfectly grilled salmon fillet served with roasted seasonal vegetables and lemon butter sauce.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat
Season salmon with salt, pepper, and olive oil
Cut vegetables into bite-sized pieces
Toss vegetables with olive oil, salt, and pepper
Grill salmon for 4-5 minutes per side
Roast vegetables at 425°F for 20 minutes
Melt butter with minced garlic and lemon juice
Serve salmon with vegetables and drizzle with lemon butter

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
description: Layers of creamy Greek yogurt, fresh berries, honey, and crunchy granola make a perfect healthy snack.
instructions: Layer Greek yogurt in a glass or bowl
Add a layer of mixed berries
Sprinkle granola on top
Add another layer of yogurt
Top with more berries and granola
Drizzle with honey
Garnish with sliced almonds

name: Chicken Stir Fry
description: Quick and colorful stir fry with tender chicken, crisp vegetables, and savory Asian-inspired sauce.
instructions: Cook rice according to package instructions
Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces
Heat sesame oil in a wok or large pan
Stir fry chicken until cooked through, remove and set aside
Add vegetables and stir fry for 3-4 minutes
Mix soy sauce, ginger, and garlic
Return chicken to pan and add sauce
Toss everything together and serve over rice
